results.owner_or_reason: Naming/ownership-boundary decision ADR (Workgraph supersedes OPS agent-side memory design), not a build spec itself. Its only concrete obligations are FR-MEM21/22/23, all covered in coverage-index.json (ENG-2232, ENG-2236, workgraph-corpus).
